# Optional PPTX Generation Guidance

Default output is PowerPoint-ready Markdown/storyboard content. If a team later wants actual `.pptx` generation, document that as optional setup using an approved workflow such as Microsoft PowerPoint, organization templates, LibreOffice, python-pptx, PptxGenJS, or another governed deck production process.

Do not make binary `.pptx` creation, shell commands, or local presentation tooling required for the core skill.
